description.title: designer
description.text: [ I create design that solves problems, boosts conversions, and looks great. I work at the intersection of web design, product, and front-end, taking metrics, MVPs, and development constraints into account. I turn business goals into clear interfaces. I know layout, and I build prototypes and landing pages fast. I use video editing for presentations, promo videos, and UI animations. ]

experience.title: Experience
experience.text: years working on commercial projects: from interface design in Figma to building UI kits and interactive prototypes. I’ve done layout in CSS, frameworks, and website builders. I know the guidelines and adapt design for different platforms; I’ve also created promo materials and videos.

projects.title: Projects
projects.text: projects delivered — from landing pages to complex web platforms. I developed several design systems, cutting build and revision time by up to 40%. I worked with products in VR, e-learning, and marketing, improving UX and visual consistency.

hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.text: In my free time, I keep growing as a designer, take on freelance work, and try new directions. I follow my favorite designers and draw inspiration from their work. Sometimes I go out to hang at cool spots, or I stay home to recharge — movies, a bit of gaming, and the gym for balance.

projects.title: commercial projects
projects.description: [ Real commercial cases brought to completion. These are things that weren’t just imagined, but launched and working in the wild. ]

designs.title: layouts
designs.description: [ Concepts and prototypes without implementation: educational, freelance projects, and personal experiments. Here, the idea, structure, and presentation matter more than the code. ]

creatives.title: creatives
creatives.description: [ A selection of visuals I generate, assemble, and refine. It includes client work and personal experiments — everything where I could play with the idea, atmosphere, and style. ]

footer.title: contact
footer.description: [ If the project feels vague, but you sense there’s something there. I’ll help find the core idea and shape it into something solid. ]

varwinDotCom.title: Varwin.com website
varwinDotCom.description: A full refresh of varwin.com — redesign, UX optimization, and new sections.
text: Redesign of the Varwin XRMS download page to refresh the interface and improve conversion. I ran short interviews with marketing and users, formulated UX hypotheses, and designed a prototype. After testing and revisions, the final version was implemented in Bootstrap 4.
Design of the user project registry in the Varwin Education section. The section brought the community together and made it possible to share your work and explore projects by other users.

xrms.title: Varwin XRMS platform
xrms.description: Varwin XRMS UI kit and prototypes for visualizing ideas and testing changes
xrms.text: The main layout with components and prototypes, bringing together all the interface elements needed to visualize and test new features in the Varwin XRMS platform. The layout serves as a basis for discussion, testing, and implementing changes in the product.
xrms.result: Developers started building interfaces faster thanks to ready-made components and clear prototypes. The layout reduced the number of revisions and ensured visual consistency.
stats: Faster mockup design through ready-made components

varwinMobile.title: Varwin mobile client
varwinMobile.text: Varwin mobile app interface — for launching projects from a smartphone or headset.

subscout.title: Subscout
subscout.text: A mobile app for adding and tracking a user’s paid subscriptions.

baikal.title: Time to Hike
baikal.text: Landing page refresh for the travel club Time to Hike, which offers trips to Lake Baikal.

pioner.title: Pioner
pioner.text: Landing page refresh for a power machinery plant.

admaster.title: AdMaster
admaster.text: Responsive landing page design for AdMaster — an online ad management platform for media publishers.

0xprocessing.title: 0x processing
0xprocessing.text: Landing page development for 0x Processing — a crypto payments service for digital goods marketplaces.

stuff.title: Stuff
stuff.text: Landing page development for Stuff — a staffing and recruiting agency.

robogrid.title: Robogrid
robogrid.text: Dashboard development for RoboGrid — a system for analyzing failures, department workloads, and robot performance.

analyticalPlatform.title: Analytical platform
analyticalPlatform.text: An interface for analyzing A/B test results with convenient filtering and metric comparison.

mooozik.title: Mooozik
mooozik.text: Mooozik is a Dutch music startup that makes unique music tracks made exclusively for cows
